text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the day off, Trainer. Rest assured, I
put it to good use.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've finally cleared away all of those errands I had
piling up!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't mean I didn't allow myself to
recover, of course. Physically, it was a welcome
reprieve.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And as for mentally... There's no better way to
unwind than spending a break doing what you
enjoy, wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Symboli Rudolf spent her day off
doing what she does best.
